name: AIR-DROW Export, Gesture & Reliability Edition
delivery: This complete final source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. node_modules and public are intentionally excluded because the production output is regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. Scanner status marks use resilient inline vectors for Android, while the editable local icon package remains available for future artwork replacement.
summary: A clean production release for high-resolution export, social and print layouts, protected hand color selection, two-finger eraser control, smoothing and private recovery diagnostics.
releaseChecks: Version, cache and build identifiers are synchronized across source, manifest and service worker.
Export plans preserve artwork geometry across Fit, Fill and Stretch layouts and exercise scale, smoothing and gesture QA in Node.
Toolbar, palette, workspace and settings are explicit protected input surfaces so UI actions never start a canvas stroke behind them.
Camera and MediaPipe remain optional and local; diagnostics excludes sensitive artwork/camera information.
